reviews.review_title: Fun and addicting, some bugs but worthit
reviews.review_description:
The game is fun and addicting to play, graphics are pretty good. My friend did lose all of her stuff and I list a few items that I had created but they are all pretty easy to get back, I like that you don't have to grind so hard to get money so you can but it back too. 

I wish that you could know for sure if there were other players in multiplayer with you, my friend and I play almost every night and have only seen other players once, we were thinking it was a myth. 
And it would be cool if we could also find other extraction mode servers to join, I like to meet btw players. 

Good, fun game, like the melee and shooting mechanics, just a few things I wish were improved or added.

I remember when this game was a horde survival game  but now it's some stupid extraction shooter. Honestly who's idea was that the game they had was great but now it's ruined by this. Best not to buy it.

Really good game honestly! It makes me think of Contractors and 7 Days to Die mixed together! I'm having a lot of fun with this! A must buy.

Edit: Lost all of my high tier items when I loaded the game. I spent so much time crafting and gathering, then, when I returned, all the stuff in my lockers was gone.

These developers suck, the items are clearing out of lockers again. The Steam original version still does not load after menu options, this started after full release and they refuse to acknowledge its not loading though others have said something.  They want your money only, they do not just intend to fix this game like the Steam original version. This game came out with the same name as that said original broken Steam version, then re named it and re sold it as a new game on Steam. 

Do not believe whatever garbage the developers tell you, it is not true. They will not get this fixed.

Edit: its not an insult when its true, you ignore your customers and react like you just did. Just like someone who knows how to do business does. You did rebrand requisition, after selling this version on quest as just Requisition, like the different version on Steam. Then changes the name to a different version while people but thebother crappy steam version while its not changed. I do not care if I am insulting, you are ripping people off. Who does business like this? Morons.

The extraction side of the game for solo players is addictive and fun (making your own weapons), however it seems the dev team aren’t working on this anyone adding new weapon parts or even new systems for your imagination to run wild, multiple saw blades gunswords or flaming axes made with chemicals, my point is that to charge for a game that’s this enjoyable and not give it more development and backing is a shame as I’ve been streaming this game and getting interest but the lack of development in a further capacity has been left stagnant,could do with a few quality of life updates atleast.

Update on 12/10/2025:

The dev has released a patched that have solved the issues written below. I played over 20 matches. My loot hasn't disappeared nor has my multiplayer game crash. Game matches now start at every 4 mins. New features such as a New map which is good, new lobby area in the hideout.  Well guys I can recommend this game to you if you like zombie, crafting, extraction survival games in VR. Updated rating to 4 stars.


Old news:

My game crashed in a multiplayer session. I lost all my loot I brought with me. Even worse, when I returned to my hide out... I lost everything I had in my storage lockers except three melee weapons. Even one of my feature unlock cassette tapes disappeared. There is no way to rejoin a session if your game crashes or you get disconnected. The only thing persistent are your funds and the lockers you have unlocked. This game is a waste of time to play until devs fix the disappearing loot problem. Also it blows to wait 10 mins to start an online session. Once issues resolved, I can offer a higher rating

reviews.review_title: my friend lost all his stuff!!
reviews.review_description: Unbelievable I WAS JUST playing WITH MY friend.  AND HE LOST BOTH AWARDS I thought THEY FIX STUFF . Just when. I. Was about to write a great review after a week of us playing .Fact he told me to pre -order the game. We did both. Same time. He had 2 awards. Those. Golden. Awards. They are gone !!.   all his stuff except one thing. In his. Lockers gone !!.  it glich us out when we were entering. The arena going down when we both came back to the game same time 2 min after his stuff was gone. He was so upset I could here how sad he was . OMG !!this just happened.. This is not right at all. He said he never playing this again . Like where did his stuff go . If that happened to him it could happen to me I HAVE 2 awards 7 lockers .After all that hard work . I really want answers and my friend wants his stuff.. Missing items and his awards he has 2.  we found 2 together I even gave him one. So i know he already had one.  Imagine having things took you grinded. Weeks for unbelievable .  i told my friend as i could here the hurt in his voice im writing a review and im getting in touch with customer service and I will give his name . Now i think this will happen to me and we both bought a machine and upgraded it. Something. With his. Level went down also.
The graphics are rough on this one. The shooting feels pretty good, but the melee physics need some work! Overall, I love the concept of this game, but actually playing it is a bit of a chore.

I thought it was horrible at first, but then I fixed a problem and it became my favorite game if you’re looking for a game where you can put anything together like a fire extinguisher in a bat all you need is those two things and some duct tape ￼

reviews.review_title: Funnest game in a long time.
reviews.review_description:
I just have to say I am thoroughly enjoying this game. If you're looking for a game that is extremely fun and in my opinion somewhat goofy this is the game for you.
Are there some hiccups absolutely but nothing that is game breaking that I have encountered so far. It's easy to make money it feels balanced because it is so easy to make money. The weapon crafting is super easy to pick up on there's no reason that people shouldn't be able to go in with guns. I have yet to feel outmatched in any of my runs. 

If you are looking for a super fun zombie smashing game that you can play with friends and duct tape stuff together to make awesome weapons this is the game for you.

reviews.review_title: Good game but the multiplayer is not
reviews.review_description: Love the game but it says that it is up to 4 players but it only allows 2 players in Main game
Its ok

first issue is the lockers are bugs and they get rid of all my stuff 
Second issue when i play multiplayer with my friend there's a stupid cue and i was hoping you guys could get rid of it like why do you have to wait 3 minutes in order play it's really stupid

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback — glad you’re enjoying the game, and sorry about the issues.

1) Lockers wiping items: we’re actively investigating the item-loss/locker bug right now and working on a fix. If you can share your platform (Quest/Steam) and roughly when it happened, that really helps.

2) Multiplayer queue/timer: we hear you. We’re going to reduce the wait timer to ~1 minute in an upcoming update so you can get into matches faster.

reviews.review_description: I just logged into my single player game and my gear and all my lockers were empty . Dude wtf ( I played it through again and it gave me the exact same items same order as before . But my pump shotgun was gold this time so that was a plus

unbelievable,this game would be great if i could play with more friends,the reason myself and my other friends got this game was because it said multiplayer but however its only allowing me to play with 1 other player,so dissapointed really ...sooo going to give 3 stars unfortunatley

I need help with Co-op, which doesn't work for me on my Meta Quest 2.  Co-Op doesn't show up in the game at startup
I can play with one person, but I'd like to play with three other people in the game.

developer_response.body:
So, co-op works for you, but you’re unhappy that co-op doesn’t work for four people via invites, and that’s why you decided to give 1 star, even though it was never stated anywhere that the invite system supports four players?

That said, you can play as a group of four if all four players start the game at the same time on the same server.

reviews.review_description: I got the game a few days ago but I have one issue, I normally play with 2 other people and the game didn't tell me that I could only play with 1 friend. If this changes in the future to make it so I can play with both of them I would give the game 5 stars
I wish i could join a random lobby instead of a friend's because I don't really have friends who play this game
The game is fun has fun premise but it’s not for me I think I’m gonna retry it when it’s out of beta
Too many glitches And says multi player but only 2 players can be in it at the same time. I tried to get a refund under 14 days and it denied me my refund.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Sorry to hear you ran into glitches — if you can share what exactly happened (when, where, and any steps to reproduce), we’ll do our best to investigate.

Regarding multiplayer: the game supports up to 4 players (as stated on the store page), and this has also been verified during the platform review/testing process. If you were only able to play with 2 at a time, that sounds like a setup/network issue or a specific bug — please tell us your platform version, game version, and how you tried to invite/join, and we’ll help.

About refunds: refunds are handled directly by Meta/Oculus under their policy and timeframe. Developers don’t control approvals/denials, so we can’t override that decision — but if you believe there was a mistake, contacting Meta Support is the best next step.

We’re happy to help and would really appreciate any more details so we can address the issues you experienced.

reviews.review_description: It you like collecting resources and crafting this works well.  It can be played on your terms.  Get in fill your backpack and get out or spend time trying to complete some of the tougher objectives.  Just go at your own pace.  Fun gameplay loop.  Try it out!

reviews.review_title: slice all those green boi’s up :D
reviews.review_description: amazing game is all I have to say, lowk wished that people got on the multiplayer mode more but single player is still fun :). O, btw the weapon crafting part was smart and I love it (even tho I find it kinda difficult 😅)

This game is so fun and the mechanics for building are just my favorite. In my opinion this game might be better than the walking dead. But this game sacrificed graphics for gameplay, story, fighting mechanics and so much more. Minus the long wait time for extraction this game is the best game I would have ever bought for my headset

I just absolutely love this game! It has honestly been so fun to play, and I've managed to get my friends involved too. The crafting mechanic is just so hilariously silly, makes me smile every time. Highly recommend!!

I just want to know where tf i find the stupid ductape
Its seriously pissing me of that the most important thing of the game doesnt have a tutorial that shows where its at 😡

It's an engaging game featuring extensive customization options for survival. As expected from a PCVR-based game, the graphical quality is solid. The most disappointing aspect is that although it's a multiplayer-focused PvPvE game, it currently only supports English. This makes it quite inconvenient for non-English speaking users to understand the game's system and play, so an urgent update to support multiple languages is critically needed.
REQUISITION VR Please add Korean.

reviews.review_title: Please help me to find duct tape
reviews.review_description: I love this Game but i don't know how to get the duct tape

first i really like this game. the idea is great and im 100% on board with it. i love the idea of a almost hunger games style like everyones watching and kinda hoping you die. but the problems i have with this games are the physics. the physics are NOT smooth at all and it feel clunky and hard to swing stuff. u cant sholder the shotguns and u cant hold pistols with two hands. the zombies feel really fake. they are not rly fun to fight at all. new maps would be cool and the enemys with the guns, it would be cool if they had different guns. i think the idea of outfit bonuses would be cool. if u find all the items of one set u get a special perk or something. something else to note is when u get done with a mission the SAMMMMEEE LINEEE plays every single time by smiley. mabye thats on purpose. but this game has so much potental and i think fixing mostly the physics would make this game more enjoyable. like saints and sinners has great zombie physics and would be amazing for this game. again i love yalls game. ive played about 4 hours of it and i rly enjoy it. Thank you so much!!

We need public multiplayer lobbies! It would make this game a 5 star game INSTANTLY.
Also, with the crowbar, a cool feature could be where you can pry planks of instead of hitting them to save durability, this would make the crowbar more useful and worth to keep. Also, why cant we combine 2 handles to make a bat? It would make since to be able too. Anyways awesome game but PLEASE pub lobbies.

Requisition VR hits every note I want from a zombie title in VR.
Genre mash-up: physics-driven extraction shooter meets sandbox survival-horror, think mini-Tarkov raids inside a Dead Rising toy box. DIY mayhem: duct-tape any two props together in seconds; my garden-rake-propane-torch build still makes me laugh out loud. Tight 15-min raids: loot fast, improvise gear, dodge (or ambush) rival squads, then sprint to evac before the horde swarms. Four-player drop-in co-op: friendly fire means real teamwork (though betrayals are priceless) and quick voice pings keep comms snappy. Always fresh: day/night cycles, weather shifts, and shuffled loot spawns keep each suburb feeling new, plus a public roadmap promises more maps and parts. Quest-ready polish: rock-solid frame-rate on my Quest 3, weighty physics, and full comfort options, no nausea, just pure adrenaline. If you crave creative weapons and tense, re-playable raids, grab this and bring extra duct tape.

So initially i thought it would be meh but its actually really fun. 

video review: 
https://youtu.be/wu7y_0IBp10?si=ZAXvXDTEZeru9CF0

Pros:
Open maps
Good horde maps
Good graphics 
Weapon selection 
Gameplay loop
Not a single bug or glitch
World design 

Cons:
Tutorial is bare
10 minute wait time for multiplayer
Single player and multiplayer have seperate progression 
Enemy human ai is beyond dumb.
Guns sound weak
The little icon for cameras should be removed

This game is already so good at just it's release. The only thing is the game isn't very challenging once you get some guns. I think they should make more intense maps that you can play on with higher tier loot. Or different things to do while you're in a raid to have a more challenging experience. Like for example you could add a device that you have to go activate and you get 1 minute to prepare defenses for it and then you have to defend it from zombies for five minutes or smthn. Just simpla things like that. Another cool thing you could do is add more hunter bases or even hunters patrolling the area. Another fun thing you could do is add a survival mode where you go into the wild and have to build a base that would save and you could come back to later. I think you should also add areas where a camp may have been infested by zombies, and then that area is heavily infested by zombies and make many zombies spawn there and such. Just things like that to make the game better. Thank you for your consideration and keep up the good work!
I waited one year for this game to come out and our tear and it’s a lack of content lack of quality just all around like big garbage

developer_response.body: Could you please specify what content you’d like us to add and what exactly you’d like us to improve in terms of quality?

reviews.review_description:
Twas a long long time ago when I got this game on my PC via steam. The concept intrigued me..combining two or more weapons to have a near endless arsenal? Kinda sounded like Dead Rising 2 and my nipps were quite hard at the thought. After my purchase, I had a little bit of buyers remorse. It just got stale quick, and it was obviously a work in progress. Totally forgot about it until I saw this game come out. I refer to it as, "this game" because it is an entirely different entity. Yeah, the combining of weapons is still there, but the steam version was a campaign-like multiplier game. This is a battle Royale. I feel like im ranting at this point, so im gonna get to the meat n potatahs-its fun. I like it and the concept a whole bunch. Why 3 stars? Absolutely dead on arrival. I have yet to see another player and I've been playing for close to 3 hours. Probs more, tbh. Another thing is the holsters. They trash and ill be aiming my gun only to have my dude holster his blicky. Oh yeah, and i heard they abandoned their steam version to make this version. I dont like when devs do that, so 3 stars it is.

EDIT: so after reading the devs response I am now editing my review. 3 stars is a very fair, if not positive rating. But not to the devs of this game. Apparently if they keep getting 3 star reviews they will abandon their game? I dunno. But the response is got is probably the worst I've ever received from a development company. Again, the review is left was very fair in my opinion and just because you put out an update, doesnt make it better at the time i left my review. But again, kind of appalled at the passive aggression lol.

developer_response.body: Hello! We’ve fixed the Steam version and released an updated build that supports cross-play with the Meta Quest version.

reviews.review_title: Would be good but not that good
reviews.review_description: I changed my mind it’s pretty fun and all but add public multiplayer servers and next update please add the graphics better because the movement hitbox and zombies look and act janky
I found this game very difficult to understand.  Graphics and movement are very clunky.  Will probably not play again and waited too long for refund.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thanks for giving our game a try and for sharing your feedback.

We’re sorry to hear that the controls, movement, and overall feel weren’t clear or comfortable for you. The game does have a learning curve, and it’s obvious we need to do a better job explaining mechanics and polishing the experience.

We’re actively working on improving graphics, movement, and onboarding for new players. If you ever decide to give it another shot, we’d really appreciate any more specific details on what felt clunky or confusing – you can always reach us on Discord.

Either way, thank you again for taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_title: So far interesting but not yet thrilling
reviews.review_description: Interest twist to zombie survival where you survive by crafting weapons. Not like Arizona sunshine 2 where you have an abundance of ammo, you really have to scourge for building material. The graphics are not as great but at this price point I wasn’t expecting as much. The zombies are very hard to kill from the geto. Even the basic zombies takes some good hits from a melee weapon and they do this gas explosion splash damage upon death. So I guess ranged weapons is the name of the game. No bugs so far except perhaps some tracking issues a few occasions where the lids to loot boxes do not open. Looking forward to diving more into the gam

Ive been waiting for this game for quite sometime and i am happy its finally out, i think my biggest gripe with this game is that your progress does not carry over from single player to multiplayer, i think thats a miss and hopefully gets changed in the future, i have a some issues getting into single player where the game would just freeze but that could also be meta’s software, also make it to where u can grip the handguns with 2 hands would be nice.

reviews.review_title: Fun game but expect to lose stuff
reviews.review_description: Well for no reason at all , lost all my gear in multi player . Game needs some serious saves of some kind lost all upgrades clothes and didnt even do a mission just dissappear after taking a break and going back in. Otherwise game has potential and is fun except for some bugs

developer_response.body: Thanks for reporting these issues! We're aware of them and are working on fixes for the upcoming updates. We understand how frustrating it can be to lose progress, and improving this experience is a priority for us. Stay tuned — we’re on it.

reviews.review_description: I like the idea of a loot game with zombies and in this, you don't feel like you can just take on all the zombies. You need strategy and sometimes you'll find yourself running instead of fighting. One issue I have with this is that the zombies can sense you so there's really no stealth option. There have multiple times when a zombie has been looking the other way but then will start groaning, turn around and chase me even though I made no noise.

Great game and I am excited for more to come, although the intro video is a bit wonky, the gameplay is actually pretty smooth. Cant wait for more updates maps and maybe modifying non base weapons like the ak

This game is really good, but has some serious problems that make it a real pain to play sometimes. You could literally have all of your stuff, and then when join a game with someone else, you lose everything you had. I lost everything out of every locker and all my data cartridges more than once. I’m constantly losing things for no reason what so ever. Having some more variation to the games like adding some more levels for extraction would be nice. Being able to grab rifles and pistols with two hands would be nice too. Trying to aim a rifle with two hands is a nightmare. More locker space would be good too. Hopefully at least the losing all your stuff thing will be fixed soon at least.

developer_response.body:
Hi VladTheRipper,
Thanks a lot for your detailed feedback! We’ve already released an update that fixed the issue with items disappearing — so you shouldn’t lose your stuff anymore. Right now, our team is working on a new map to bring more variety for extractions. Also, two-handed grabs for rifles and pistols are already in development, and this feature will be included in one of the upcoming updates very soon.

reviews.review_description: Was pretty excited for this one, but there some annoying stuff. Im playing on Q3 and the game is choppy with tons of jaggies. I could forgive the cartoony graphics if the game played smooth. Also havent we learned yet not to slap UI on top of the player face in VR? Every time you move a green bar pops up in your face. Your health bar also keeps intruding. Games solved this a long time ago, put it on the watch! Or, at least let us turn it off in settings. The big environments and looting are good but the melee doesn't really do much to zombies. You dont feel like you're doing any real damage with no wound decals. just keep smackin em till they fall over.  Kept braining one with a fire axe, but blade doesnt stick in them. Every weapon feels like a blunt weapon. The shooting isnt bad. The iron sights are accurate, but the gun angle for the pistol is of course pointed upwards with no option to adjust it. So get ready to bend that wrist! Also no two handing of pistols. I think there's a groundwork for something decent here but feels pretty basic right now. Refunding till it gets updated some.

developer_response.body: In the latest update, we fixed the gore decals, adjusted the gun angle, reworked the economy, and made many other improvements. We’d be happy if you could give the game another try and hopefully change your opinion for the better.

reviews.review_title: Love the game, just not much to it.
reviews.review_description:
I really really like the game. It's a great concept. Just not much to it. After a couple of hours you've done and seen everything. I like the idea of it. Just wish their were more goals. I've tried to enjoy it as finding and collecting items, but that doesn't really work because their isn't much storage space. I've never seen any of the zombie trophies that are supposed to spawn when you kill zombies. And I've killed TONS. There just isn't an overall point to the game. Maybe make a goal. An amount of money you earn to buy your freedom. Different prizes. This game could go alot of places. Fighting for your freedom, escape, hunting down the jerks who imprisoned you. Unfortunately it's just one of those games you play for a few hours and uninstall.
I do play solo. This review can't count for multiplayer. I haven't encountered any bugs in my playtime either. Game is fun, looks great. There just isn't much to it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great ideas. We share many of your views and are already working to improve the economy and strengthen long-term player motivation.

reviews.review_title: Very good game just needs more
reviews.review_description: When i first saw this game it reminded me of dead rising with the combination of two random things into making a weapon. After playing both extraction (which was pretty fun) and horde mode (too easy) Also I have done many multi-player raids and haven't encountered one person. The game is really fun but its just missing some things that were promised in the trailer and I highly recommend with friends because it gets boring fast by yourself. Also the progression I feel is too fast or there isn't enough because I unlocked pretty much everything in the first hour and a half - 2 hours (except the golden zombie trophies which i dont even think are a thing yet). I will continue to support this game i love the idea and what they have done. I just think it needs more.

reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME SO MUCH!!!!
reviews.review_description: look if you’re not into survival and crafting then DONT BY THIS ONE, but if you love this stuff then this game is for ya. The devs did so well at making this survival and horror soo well. I WOULD DEFINITELY RECOMMEND.

Decent game so far. However we really need to be able to make private rooms. My son and I had just gotten in and someone was lying in wait and killed us both. Very frustrating.  Please make the option of having private rooms. Also more than 2 people on private rooms for for friends and family

A primarily melee based extraction game (there are guns but with the wild melee concoctions you can come up with,why would you want to use guns?)

Get in grab some loot, bash some zombies heads in, what is there not to like?

There are some performance hitches (nothing game breaking) that hopefully will be ironed out in patches.

The best thing for those that may not be into the whole competitive extraction type game, but may be into the looting loop is that there is a single player mode (where you will be only competing with AI e.g. no human players)

There's also an option to play in co-op with one friend

Its a promising start, I hope the developer continues to polish the performace a touch.
Please add campaign mode I bought it thinking it was already in the game couse all the reviews on steam I wasn’t expecting this version just not to have it

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback!

However, the Meta Quest page has never stated that the game includes a campaign mode. In fact, it clearly lists two modes: Extraction and Horde.

We’re open to adding new modes in the future, but not under conditions where we receive no support and are instead pressured with negative reviews as a form of blackmail to speed up development.
New modes cannot be developed in a short period of time.

reviews.review_title: Really fun game, soft locked myself
reviews.review_description:
I genuinely enjoy this game so much, but I died and lost my pda map upgrade and now I can’t play the game properly, is there a way to fix this or am I just stuck forever?

Edit: I managed to get the map module but it was by selling the basketball and the stake in the main lobby then going into a horde mode game, dying and repeating the process until I had enough money to purchase a map module from the machine, I do truly like this game a lot but if I have to do that each time, it is truly not worth playing

developer_response.body: Hello! It looks like we found a bug that could cause the PDA map upgrade to be lost, and we've already released a hotfix.

reviews.review_description:
During my 2h of playthrough trying to connect with a friend and start the game in a party took more than half of that time. Inviting didn't work most of the time. We managed to play ONE game during that time.

There was no real challenge, zombies are stupid and deaf, there were no players, a lot of loot. The most damage we took was from accidentally running next to each other with weapons out (friendly fire). Or trapwires. Also, the angle of holding items is off.

I can see potential, but for now experience was more irritating than rewarding. To the point i considered a refund, tho decided to leave it in the library.

Edit

Played some more. At some point my friend lost everything he earned (including stuff stored in lockers and data cartridges already put into slots), even if we manage to create a party sometimes it spawns only one person and the 2nd one has black screen and needs to restart the game, the friendly fire (with meele) is just too much, trapwires sometimes explodes even if you cut them, not too often tho, and sometimes its not synced correctly and only one person can see it. Also the progress is pretty lame, after 3 games we just storm through the map with no worries, fully armored and armed with guns, full ammo, katanas. It shouldnt be this easy. The only danger are friends with katana out walking too close :d

reviews.review_title: Game is fun but have a few questions
reviews.review_description:
Everywhere i read the game is 4 player coop. But we cannot seem to get more than 2 in a game without errors. Physics seems ok but melee feels weak. Enjoy the
Gameplay but if our group of 4 cannot play together on quest will be shelving for an update. 
Game just needs some polish but if it gets a few decent updates could be a killer app!

developer_response.body:
There is a way to play together with more than two people. While the invite system only allows you to play with one friend, you can all press the “Start Game” button at the same time — in that case, the matchmaking system is likely to place everyone in the same session.

We’re planning to release an update on July 14th or 15th that will improve the chances of all players being matched into the same session in multiplayer. Also, if you want to be in the same session, make sure everyone selects the same region when entering multiplayer.

What specifically would you like to improve in melee combat?

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun with 1 major issue
reviews.review_description: This game is fun. I love the weather,  the fact you can go everywhere in all the building. The weapo s and various upgrades, super cool.  So far my issue is with height calibration.   I have re calibrated numous times but im almost always crouching.  I have to look up to run

reviews.review_title: A game thats as good as it runs
reviews.review_description: So first the quality is good with a sorta borderlands like look, second, the weapons they’re also good with there being ones that are broken but with the crazy duct tape creativity you can combine a broken handle with a knife and make a spear or use a bottle to make a blunt halberd using a sledgehammer though there is no players currently the game loop is still good cause the zombies can be your friends

Good start. Enemies may be the weakest part at the moment. I know physics will come.. but the gear so far is awesome. Already have my samurai swords, but breaking down items for ammo is genius! Using guns are good so far.. little wonky with the makeshift shotgun though. Great start, can't wait for updates...

Overall an ok game with a decent foundation.  But it's a chore to get 3 of us in a match at the same time. It's sloppy to have to join a game as separate teams to attempt to get in same lobby as opposed to just being able to have everyone join one game and go into an extraction. 
I understand you made it easier but I've never seen another real player in the extraction mode when I've gone into one by myself.  It may be possible still. But after 8 games I can't have that kind of luck lol

developer_response.body: Hello. We recently released an update that increases the number of multiplayer sessions with other players. Currently, the most populated server is US East.

reviews.review_title: This game is amazing but need more stuff
reviews.review_description: This game is the best vr game I own, and there is a lot of pros but also some cons. For one,I have a great map idea for a future update, a giant city with lots of outposts and good loot. And you can go in the building and stuff. Two, if the stay over the 35 minute mark, instead of dying, there should be a big horde of zombies and you have to survive it for like 10 minutes or so. And the zombies should sprint. Three, one small thing,add an option for no turning because I have controller drift in my right controller and will start spinning at random. Four, please add a campaign. And five, and an option where we are able to choose what map to do on multiplayer. I got forest like five times in a row not knowing which was which. But this is a great game with potential
I’ve waited for this game for a while, even forgot it existed lol. But now it’s out. I am very interested in it and will try it out once it installs!:)
Only allows you to play with 1 other person when all reviews say it’s up to 4 players

developer_response.body:
Hi! Multiplayer supports up to 4 players in the main game, and in our recent Christmas update the holiday lobby supports up to 6 players (Snowball mode only).

If you mean co-op specifically, co-op in the new version is designed for 2 players, and we’ve never advertised 4-player co-op for this release. The reviews you’re referring to are most likely talking about the original game, which had different multiplayer rules.

reviews.review_title: Was ok but not my type of game
reviews.review_description:
I was waiting so long for this game cause it looked good but once I was able to play it I didn't really like the graphics nor was it my type of game and I lost my gun before getting into the game arena and ammo beg kept getting in my way of view, was hard to pick up and put stuff away. 

Overall it's a good game if you like this type of game, but to me it wasn't my favorite

The game has a good concept however losing everything when you die is very frustrating. I can see losing all in your backpack but all the clothing, map, and backpack upgrades should stay intact. Also losing all your money is very aggravating. The money is in your account so it shouldn’t disappear if you die. Wish there was a co-op mode to just play with your friends and not worry about some other jerk in the game showing up and killing you. Learned that the hard way. There should be an option to just play alone with friends only to worry about zombies and smiley face hunters not some jerk sneak up behind you and shoot you. I really wanted to like this game but I wanted it to be fun and it is more irrating than fun. To go in with stuff you have bought and crafted after multiple runs just to lose it all if you die really sucks and makes me want to shelf the game since it is too late to refund it. The time to wait to go into the game is also way too long. There should be a way to speed up the clock to go right in if you’re ready. Anyway hoping the developers take some of these suggestions into consideration.

developer_response.body: Hello! We recently updated the game and specifically fixed the issue with disappearing loot, as well as made significant changes to the in-game economy. We’d be happy if you could give it another try and hopefully change your opinion.

reviews.review_description: adds horde mode, I expect it to be like the steam horde mode, Zombies bug out if you punch them one too many times. Cinema

developer_response.body: The game can’t be exactly the same as on Steam. Please understand that in order for it to run on much weaker hardware, we had to greatly optimize and simplify the physics and the zombies’ behavior.

reviews.review_description: Good premise, but pretty jank. Love the idea of making dead rising-esque combo weapons in vr, but the crafting system is weird and restrictive. Plus once you get good weapons and guns, all difficulty disappears so there's not a lot of replayability.

So far it's been a fun game to play. Especially when you manage to get your party all set up...but there-in lies a problem. Hosting/joining a friend's multiplayer room is very clunky, partially because the invite runs directly through the Quest OS instead of the game itself. When you DO get your friend loaded in, it seems like the microphone cuts in and out, so it can be a challenge to communicate. 

Also, it seems like your party is restricted to only 2 players. You +1. 
It would be nice if it supported a party of 3 or 4

All in all, fun game with a couple early bugs to work out. Hopefully this is addressed soon.

The games is itself but it needs a little bit of work on the multiplayer I haven’t played solo yet but I bet it’s good over worth it because there’s going to be future updates and the games gonna be even better then before honestly worth buying if your willing to wait a bit. 5/5⭐️

This game was a lot of fun to play and I am very excited to see what happens moving forward. I am a little disappointed since this game is very different from the the game on steam witch leads me to some suggestions that I would believe would make the game better

•it would be nice to see blood in the floor, weapons, etc. 

•it would be nice if The zombies didn’t disappear The second you kill them

•It would be nice if you could grab the zombies

•a must need is sharp object peircing. For example, right now whenever you stab a zombie the blade slides to the side it’d be nice to see it go through them this also leads to my next point witch be to see wounds on the zombies

•it would also be cool that if you slice a donbie in half they’ll crawl at you

• finally this game needs a campaign like the steam version. The horde mode is basically the same as survival but this game would thrive from a campaign

First of all I would like to say that this game is an incredible idea! Crafting anything from scratch appeals to myself as really cool and engaging in a vr game. Furthermore, when I saw it had zombies I was ecstatic as I was looking for a physics based zombie game that was creative and wasn’t an 18. 

Here’s some ideas to make this game better:

. Improved zombie physics - zombies trip randomly when walking, they react more realistically to getting hit with a weapon or object, blood and gash decals on zombies when and where they hit
. Able to grab zombies and throw them or push them away from you     
. Able to punch and kick zombies useful for having no weapons, to create space or to kick a zombie into spikes or a trap
. More vibrant and less foggy atmosphere maybe add a day and night option to each map
. More maps.
. Zombies take longer to disappear after being killed (so you can have zombies dead on the ground)
. I don’t know if this is a bug or not but whenever you look down the game thinks you’recroiching or at least for me so u can’t jump or sprint it’s very annoying  
. Please make it so your character doesn’tget out of breath after two seconds of running it’s also agitating  
. Ability to parry and stagger zombies with a weapon or tool
. Make the game feel a little more fun and a little less like a horror game 😅
. Please change the ai voice for Mr. Smiley
. Add an interactive intro where you are surrounded, fighting for your life on your way to the “sanctuary” you have been promised then when you get there you are manhandled and thrown into a box instead of a 2D cutscene 
. I feel quite small in the world and I have to reach up high to open some boxes or smash security cameras so perhaps you could reconsider the placement of these? 
. A skill tree could be cool used to unlock things like drop kick or heavy attacks or anything like that maybe ability to climb fences?
. Add more zombie varients and different enemies, some faster than others or with different abilities
. A campaign would be cool as well
. Oh and a more detailed tutorial with crafting explained I had to search it up haha
. Please fix the gun handling with 2 hands

. MORE GORE!!!!!!!

Of course I have listed a load of ideas and don’t expect you to add them all of any and it could take years to implement these so don’t rush out any updates! I understand how hard it is to implement features like these and wanted to let you know that you are doing a great job and you don’t deserve all these unfair reviews and comments about your game keep up the amazing work and hopefully this can become one of the best zombie survival games on quest! ❤️

This game is amazing fun!
Right from the start, it impresses!

I love your base hub, how it’s designed, with the various rooms, storage and crafting, equip screen too… and the tutorial rooms to give you a taste of what’s to come! (Remember to place the special item you get at the end of the tutorial, to get some loot)
Little things like looking up and seeing the sky through the damaged roof.
The screens that give info on the game and your stats from your previous game.
Also there is an area to place collectibles/trophies which give you random loot and money for your game.
Took me a while to realise how to store money into your account though… I wasn’t aware there was a button on the side that you had to press, once you had placed your money.

The atmosphere it generates is perfect!

Love the neat touch of when you are transported to the mission area, it’s in a box that is surrounded by airbags, so as you don’t get hurt landing.

I like how you find some cool loot when in the zombie infested areas… but you have to get to the extraction zomes to be able to keep and equip the items.
Like how the extraction works with you having to find the four code panels dotted around the area, which show up on your map… then get to the safe and enter the code.

On the way to finding the code panels, you encounter various types of zombies .. from the standard, to armoured, to giant charging ones, and toxic ones…. They all give chase too!

To aid you, there is lots and LOTS of loot to find and use as weapons… or tape together to make new weapons… be creative!
One I came across was a leaf blower, telling me to attach a welder to it, to turn it into a flame thrower!

Like that you can enter houses and breakdown the wooden, brick and metal barricades.

Graphics are ok, but with so much going on in this game, I guess the graphics had to be toned down a little.

Sound is great though and I like the physics.

Really enjoyable, intense game with plenty of variety and stuff to create and find.

I can only imagine the fun this would be with friends or playing against other humans too aswell as zombies!
Will try the multiplayer soon and update my review.

I highly recommend this game. 
Only criticism I have is that maybe there needs to be more maps… which maybe the dev is working on?

reviews.review_title: Has 3 players on the cover art
reviews.review_description: Can only have 2 players in a lobby💀

developer_response.body: The game supports up to 4 players. The image never says co-op supports up to 3. You and your friends can still play together—up to 4 people—by forming two teams of 2 and joining the same server.

reviews.review_description: I love the game I waited so long to get it so now a update is needed because the stuff u get don’t be in the lockers when u load back in also when playing multiplayer  it should queue in random players because all my friends don’t have it yet and it be nice to meet new people with the game so we can run other then that I really love it ￼
After a few hours the game becomes boring, easy, and pointless. PvP - I haven't met anyone on the map yet.the only thing this game has is nice graphics, zombies and potential....

developer_response.body: Hello! A few days ago, we released an update that improves matchmaking in multiplayer. Now, a much larger number of sessions have between 2 and 4 players (the most populated server is US East). We’d be happy if you give it another try!

reviews.review_description: game is horrible someone said ghost of tabor but zombies no. its not the guns r horrible to use its super buggy and 90% of the time i can play 1 game w my buddy then it wont let us play

We released an update with fixes for the friend invite system, so you can now play any mode you want with your buddy.
Are there any specific issues that are bothering you? Let us know — we wanna fix them all

I googled repeatedly and it said it would have the option… it doesn’t. I really wish meta would do a filter for people like me who have to have teleport locomotion option.

Enjoy this game on so many levels. I mean there's a lot of zombie games but what makes this one separate and different is thr openness of how you play the game, the crafting, it all just makes you wanna jump RIGHT BACK IN! STOCK UP AND USE THE LOCKERS!! Haha
The game that was completed, even after cutting off and betraying the Steam users who supported it first, was a bug-ridden, featureless escape shooter, the worst game ever made.

developer_response.body: Hello! We’ve fixed the Steam version and released an updated build that supports cross-play with the Meta Quest version.
